text: The sterile, glass-encased environment makes me feel somewhat alienated—a quiet, futuristic hush settles over everything, and I am both observer and outsider. The colorful R+D wall sparks my curiosity, pulling me slightly out of my detachment. The text on the large screen resonates with me, voicing an inner uncertainty and sense of anticipation I recognize in myself. I feel a subtle tension: between organization and potential, between clarity and ambiguity, between my presence and the impersonal surroundings. In this place, thought hovers, waiting to find its proper form.
